title: Youtube Poop: Christopher Nolan Directs Shakespeare
description:
Here's a little something I put together to let you know I'm not dead and haven't given up or whatever.

Woo!  It feels like forever since I made something!  When exactly was my last poop?  Let's see now...do de do de d-woah, wha?  Wha?!  WHAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAA
